name: In Hollow Halls Beneath the Fells
description:
Wandering aimless, you start to ask your self when will this torment end?  
Only the most evil human, or not?!  Being, could live under such
circumnstances.  As soon as you reach this gargantuan marble room, you place
your eyes in a big table, in the center of it, around the table, beside the
chairs, there is lots of barrels, weapons and what cannot be missing, dead
bodies and blood...  There is also a single curiously human skull placed by one
of the table's chair.
